chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 242 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.02.2025 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 3821/20 For hearing of main case Mr. Shaukat Ali Kaka, Advocate for applicant Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G. Counsel for Applicant on instructions does not press this Cr. Misc. Application under Section 561-A Cr.P.C. which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
